LightningComponentBundle.description: A modern, website-style record list for Experience Cloud sites. Displays Salesforce records with colored status/priority pills, stat cards, tab filtering, search, and pagination — designed for external audiences, not repurposed from internal Lightning.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: Salesforce object to query (e.g. Case, Application__c, Payment__c)

property.name: displayFields
property.label: Display Fields (comma-separated)
property.description: Field API names to show as columns, e.g. CaseNumber,Subject,Status,Priority

property.name: nameField
property.label: Name / Title Field
property.description: Field rendered as the clickable record link in the first column

property.name: statusField
property.label: Status Field API Name
property.description: Field whose values get colored status pills (e.g. Status)

property.name: priorityField
property.label: Priority Field API Name
property.description: Field whose values get colored priority pills (e.g. Priority). Leave blank to hide.

property.name: filterField
property.label: Filter / Tab Field
property.description: Field used to build the stat cards and filter tabs (usually the same as Status Field)

property.name: listTitle
property.label: List Title
property.description: Main heading displayed at the top of the component (e.g. 'My Cases', 'Payment History')

property.name: subtitle
property.label: Subtitle
property.description: Smaller descriptive text shown directly below the title (e.g. 'View and manage your open cases')

property.name: showStatCards
property.label: Show Metric Cards
property.description: Toggle the KPI stat cards row above the table on or off

property.name: statCardIcons
property.label: Metric Card Icons (comma-separated)
property.description: Lightning Design System icon names for each stat card in order, e.g. 'standard:case,utility:clock,action:approval,standard:task'. Browse icons at lightningdesignsystem.com/icons

property.name: recordPageName
property.label: Record Detail Page Name
property.description: Experience Cloud named page to navigate to on row click. Leave blank to use standard record page.
